meaning: n.兼管数个教堂者,兼职者
examples: The pluralist genie will be out of the bottle.
We live in a pluralist society.
But their downfall may also mean that in the drug industry, as in politics, Mexico is becoming more modern and pluralist.
There are many ways to practise the history of ideas, and true to the pluralist tenor of his subject, Mr Menand seems happy to employ almost all of them.
